name: deepcore_ladder
description: The Iron Ladder (q.side_ladder slot 52, Deepcore SQ2): Old Dun's 3-round NO-HEAL gauntlet down the played-out shaft. Locked-gate beat first (no defeated_deepcore_trainer_2 -> the locked_button explains the gym gate, iron_ladder_active must NOT set), then the shipped gym-trainer defeat tag is injected by rcon (Battle Girl Mika's tag - fighting her for real is the gym scenarios' job), the start button arms iron_ladder_active, and the three rounds run back-to-back via dev-bot autobattle with NO heal command anywhere between them (the party carries damage forward - that is the design under test; two lv-100 Garchomp are the attrition headroom over aces L34/35/37). Round buttons are defeat-tag chained (round N+1 only renders after defeated_sq_ladder_N), claim pays face 700 via the skewed payout + Expert Belt + iron_ladder_cleared, and the cleared entry (prio 40) tombstones. No fees anywhere on the ladder (walking off is free - fairness floor), so no funding in the preamble. Re-runs accumulate one Garchomp pair per run.
_probe_note: Old Dun's compiled latch rides the y=129 plaza height but the neighboring live-swept roggenrola ambient sits at y=119 three blocks away (1063.5,119,3202.5) - the shaft mouth terrain drops; ground-probe before the first live run.

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog, then reset the whole ladder state (idempotent re-runs) including the injected gym tag and the claim item --
-- tp to the shaft (latch spawns within 40b; the body persists - no kill/latch-reset needed), then daylight + battle prep --
-- party reset: junk lv-5 parties stall TBCS battle init (verified live); empty all 6 slots, then the two-Garchomp attrition pair. NO heal will be issued again until the scenario ends --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100

steps.comment_: cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- beat 1: the gym gate HOLDS. Without defeated_deepcore_trainer_2 only the locked_button shows; clicking it explains the gate and must NOT arm the ladder --

steps.expect_screen_text: I need to prove myself first

steps.click: I need to prove myself first

steps.wait_chat: The ladder is for people who can already swing

steps.comment: -- beat 2: inject the shipped gym-trainer defeat tag (Battle Girl Mika - the real fight belongs to the gym scenarios), then the start button must render and arm the ladder --
-- beat 3: Round 1 (sq_ladder_1, ace L34). in_progress entry (prio 30); the round button closes the dialog itself, the fight runs server-side, the @2 win line anchors the wait --

steps.comment_: battle GUI replaces the dialog now that the dispatch is ANCHORED (2026-07-18) — close it and let the win-line wait pace the fight (wisps idiom)

steps.comment: -- beat 4: Round 2 (sq_ladder_2, ace L35). NO heal between rounds - carried damage stands; the Round 2 button rendering at all IS the defeat-tag chain assert --

steps.comment_: battle GUI replaces the dialog now that the dispatch is ANCHORED (2026-07-18) — close it and let the win-line wait pace the fight (wisps idiom)

steps.wait_chat: Two. The rock does not soften. One more waits.

steps.comment: -- beat 5: Round 3, the last swing (sq_ladder_3, ace L37). Still no heal --

steps.comment_: battle GUI replaces the dialog now that the dispatch is ANCHORED (2026-07-18) — close it and let the win-line wait pace the fight (wisps idiom)

steps.wait_chat: no water, still standing. That is the ladder.

steps.comment: -- beat 6: the claim. Pays face 700 via the skewed payout (receipt overlay, amount not exact-asserted - rate rides cd_instability), Expert Belt, IRON LADDER CLEARED --
-- beat 7: the cleared entry (prio 40) tombstones - assert via its stable button label (say pair rotates and both lines carry the Gaviota hook) --

-- cleanup: the injected gym tag comes OFF (the test player has not really beaten Mika - other content gates on it); iron_ladder_cleared stays as the quest-done latch (preamble resets it on re-runs) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
